example.result_summary: Detected 17 vessels in New York Harbor.

reasons: Onboard ship_detection model eliminates raw-scene downlink.
Next Svalbard contact in 28 minutes fits the fastest priority.
sim_leo_01 scored highest for fastest priority with an onboard model.
Fallback aws_us_east_gpu retained in case the contact window slips.

events.message: Selected sim_leo_01 at 87% route confidence; latency 38 minutes, cost $84.00, fallback aws_us_east_gpu.
